nodes_added.statement: Ancient Egyptian civilization flourished along the Nile River for over 3000 years
The pyramids of Giza were built as monumental tombs for the pharaohs
Hieroglyphics served as the written language of ancient Egypt
The Apollo 11 mission successfully landed humans on the Moon in 1969
Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on the lunar surface
The Saturn V rocket was the most powerful launch vehicle ever built
Quantum mechanics describes the behavior of matter at atomic and subatomic scales
The Heisenberg uncertainty principle states that certain pairs of physical properties cannot be simultaneously known
Wave-particle duality is a fundamental concept in quantum theory
Vincent van Gogh painted Starry Night during his time at an asylum in Saint-Rémy
Post-Impressionism emerged as a reaction to Impressionism in the late 19th century
Van Gogh used bold colors and dramatic brushwork in his paintings
DNA contains the genetic instructions for all living organisms
The double helix structure was discovered by Watson and Crick in 1953
Genes are segments of DNA that encode specific proteins
The French Revolution began in 1789 with the storming of the Bastille
Napoleon Bonaparte rose to power during the Revolutionary period
The guillotine became a symbol of the Reign of Terror
Machine learning algorithms can identify patterns in large datasets
Neural networks are inspired by biological brain structures
Deep learning uses multiple layers to progressively extract features
The Amazon rainforest produces approximately 20% of Earth's oxygen
Deforestation threatens biodiversity in tropical ecosystems
Indigenous peoples have lived sustainably in the Amazon for thousands of years
Black holes are regions of spacetime where gravity is so strong that nothing can escape
Event horizons mark the boundary of a black hole
Hawking radiation suggests black holes can gradually lose mass
The Renaissance began in Italy during the 14th century
Leonardo da Vinci epitomized the Renaissance ideal of the polymath
The printing press revolutionized the spread of knowledge in Europe
Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy in plants
Chlorophyll absorbs light primarily in red and blue wavelengths
Jazz music originated in African American communities in New Orleans
Improvisation is a key element of jazz performance
Louis Armstrong pioneered the jazz solo form
The Industrial Revolution transformed manufacturing through mechanization
Steam engines powered factories and locomotives
Urbanization accelerated as workers moved to industrial cities
Antibiotics revolutionized medicine by fighting bacterial infections
Penicillin was discovered by Alexander Fleming in 1928
Antibiotic resistance poses a growing threat to public health
The Roman Empire reached its greatest extent under Emperor Trajan
Roman engineering achievements included aqueducts and roads
Latin formed the basis for Romance languages

candidates.statement: Carbon dioxide and water are converted into glucose and oxygen
candidates.reason: Statement contains multiple claims joined by conjunction
